items.briefing:
Australia's Five Eyes partners have issued a warning that AI-related cyber threats are escalating and could intensify within months — a timely reminder for all staff to stay alert to increasingly convincing phishing emails and scams. Separately, attackers are actively exploiting a vulnerability in Fortinet firewall devices (dubbed "FortiBleed"), turning them into tools that steal login credentials. If your organisation uses Fortinet products, check with your IT team that security patches are up to date.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected email asking you to click a link or enter your credentials, verify it by contacting the sender directly through a known phone number — not by replying to the email.

featured.title: Five Eyes warn AI cyber risks are rising within months
featured.quote: Five Eyes warns AI cyber threats demand immediate board-level attention as risks escalate within months.
